headline: LENNOX INTERNATIONAL INC (NYSE:LII): A Quality Dividend Stock for Sustainable Income
summary: Lennox International (LII) exemplifies a quality dividend stock with a reliable payout, strong earnings, and sustainable growth for long-term income investors.
